summary: The diff implements REQ-43 and REQ-44 correctly. REQ-42 (fixing the InternetIdentityProvider URL) is not addressed in any of the modified files — main.tsx is an immutable path but the requirement still needed to be fulfilled somewhere, and no alternative file was modified to set the correct identityProvider URL.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure the InternetIdentityProvider receives the correct identityProvider URL for the current environment (local: http://rdmx6-jaaaa-aaaaa-aaadq-cai.localhost:4943, production: https://identity.ic0.app), using import.meta.env.DEV or similar flag, removing any hardcoded/unreachable URL.
missing_requirements.reason: None of the modified files (App.tsx, ProtectedRoute.tsx, useActorReady.ts, frontend-file-summaries.txt, project_state.json) touch the InternetIdentityProvider instantiation or its identityProvider prop. main.tsx is listed as immutable but the requirement still demands the correct URL be set — no alternative file was modified to address this.

hallucinated_features.description: A 'settled flag' pattern using useRef and useState was introduced in RootLayout (App.tsx), ProtectedRoute.tsx, and useActorReady.ts to prevent re-showing the loader on brief re-initialization flashes caused by an authClient dependency loop.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked to block routing decisions while isInitializing is true. It did not request a 'has ever settled' optimization or special handling of a secondary re-initialization flash from an authClient dependency loop. This is extra logic beyond what was specified.
